params.name: amount
params.description: The amount of moner you would like to gamble
params.notes: The amount will default to 50 moner if you don't specify. You cannot gamble more than you have!

params.name: card-rank-suit
params.description: The rank, or suit, card to gamble on.
params.notes: AnikethAI will try its very best to parse what you mean but try to be clear!

bank.cmd_desc: Check your bank account and see at what time you can reload your account!

bank-reload.cmd_desc: Reload your bank account! This can only be done **once** a day!

request.cmd_desc: Add topic(s) to the topic queue.

params.name: topic
params.description: The topic to add in english.

rm.cmd_desc: Remove a topic from the queue.

params.name: topics
params.description: Which topics to remove from queue by number in the queue.
params.notes: This can be one or multiple topics.

params.name: span
params.description: A range of topics to remove from the queue.

thought.cmd_desc: Send a thought on a topic.

params.name: topic
params.description: The topic to send a thought on.

admin.cmd_desc: Displays a message which gives the status of the bot.

params.name: task_name
params.description: The task to start or stop.

params.name: task_name
params.description: The task to start or stop.

admin-statusl.cmd_desc: Displays a message which gives the status of all task loops.

admin-kill.cmd_desc: Completely shuts down the bot. Must react to the bot message with <:L_:1136812895859134555> within 10 seconds.

admin-minstars.cmd_desc: Change the minimum number of stars for a starboard message.

params.name: stars
params.notes: Must be a valid integer, defaults to 3.

params.name: channel
params.description: The channel to become the starboard.
params.notes: Must be a valid channel, defaults to the dump channel.

admin-getrss.cmd_desc: Updates the RSS channel from some time ago.

params.name: days
params.description: How many days ago to pull posts from

params.name: hours
params.description: How many hours ago to pull posts from

params.name: minutes
params.description: How many hours ago to pull posts from

admin-setrss.cmd_desc: Sets a new channel for the RSS feed to dump into

params.name: channel
params.description: The channel to set RSS feed dumps into
params.notes: This must be a valid text channel.

admin-addfeed.cmd_desc: Adds a URL to parse when updating the RSS feed.

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to add to the list of feeds to update
params.notes: This must be a valid RSS url.

admin-listfeeds.cmd_desc: Lists the currently active RSS feeds
